title: Smoky Roasted Uruguayan Tofu Gratin
description: A kidfriendly, umamirich, gooey gratin that marries smoky tofu with creamy oatmilk sauce, finished under a golden crust of vegan cheese.
instructions: Press the tofu for 20 min to remove excess moisture. Slice into 1 cm thick slabs and place on a parchment‑lined baking sheet.
Heat 1 Tbsp olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the tofu slabs and sear for 2–3 min per side until golden.
In a small bowl whisk together oat milk, soy sauce, smoked paprika, oregano, nutritional yeast, salt, and pepper.
Pour the sauce over the seared tofu slabs, ensuring each piece is well coated.
Sprinkle the shredded vegan cheddar and mozzarella evenly over the tofu.
Top with fresh rosemary and a light shower of olive oil to promote browning.
Toss the breadcrumbs into the remaining tablespoon of olive oil and sprinkle over the gratin for a crunchy crust.
Bake in the preheated oven for 18–20 min, or until the cheese is bubbly and the top is golden‑brown.
Let the gratin rest for 5 min before serving.
